description_long: This is a classic, ornate street light featuring three lantern-style lamp heads arranged in a triangular formation at the top of a tall, black metal pole. Each lamp head has a faceted, hexagonal design with yellow-tinted glass panels and decorative finials on top, evoking a vintage Victorian aesthetic. The lamp heads are supported by elegantly curved arms with scrollwork details, branching out symmetrically from a central hub. The pole itself is slender and smooth, culminating in a rounded, robust base that provides stability. The overall structure is designed to be both functional and decorative, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or historic districts. The materials and craftsmanship suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A tall, ornate black street light with three yellow-glass, lantern-style lamp heads and decorative scrollwork arms, mounted on a sturdy round base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three lantern-style lamp heads and the decorative scrollwork arms branching symmetrically from the pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the lamp heads, with two visible in profile and the central head partially obscured, highlighting the pole's slenderness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the three lamp heads and scrollwork arms from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the lamp heads in profile and the pole's smooth surface.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with hexagonal, faceted yellow glass panels, decorative finials, and ornate metal framing.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Scrollwork arms and decorative finial details at the lamp head junction; otherwise smooth.
